title: hymenasplenium obliquissimum
intro: Hymenasplenium obliquissimum, also known as the mountain spleenwort, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried powder, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
